summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 29/06/2023
DCE iron ore futures tight by 0.85%. some traders were active to sell, steel mills purchased on demand, and purchasingenthusiasm have improved. today's overall market transaction atmosphere in general.
